label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The problem is about figuring out between what times Sean could have gone to the bakery. The bakery was closed after 9pm. So the latest possible time would be 9pm. Now let's check the other information. Sean woke up at 5am. Then James saw Sean in class from 5am to 6am. Then David saw Sean buying lunch at the deli from 6am to 8am. Then Betty saw Sean at the mall from 8am to 9am. After that, Linda saw Sean on the rooftop from 9am to 5pm. And then later, Tiffany saw Sean driving to the water park from 8pm to 9pm. So, the key is to figure out
